attacking_style: Not primarily an attacker; demonstrates ability to survive hard selections and position for sprint finishes after sustained climbing efforts.
team_tactics: Limited data, but as Continental rider in mixed-level races shows independent positioning without WorldTour-level team support through technical finales.
terrain_preference: Can handle medium-length climbs (15km) at high intensity before sprinting; suited to hilly stages with sprint finishes rather than pure climbing tests.
vulnerability: Unknown competitive ceiling against full WorldTour sprint specialists; Continental team resources likely limit ability to control positioning consistently.
key_patterns: Survives WorldTour-intensity selections despite Continental-level status (1 observed instance)
Leads out sprints after sustained climbing efforts showing durability-speed combination (1 instance)
Outperforms expected level as non-WorldTour rider in professional mixed fields (1 instance)
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from early 2020 insufficient to assess trajectory or subsequent development
